title: T-004 — Reference.ManufacturingOperations table + multi-industry seeds
prompt:
# T-004 — Reference.ManufacturingOperations table

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §4.5 + Appendix A
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Reference.ManufacturingOperations table (replaces hardcoded Process_1..4) and seed defaults for Bakery / Pharmacy / FMCG industries.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0013 emits Reference.ManufacturingOperations per §4.5 (id PK, tenant_id, operation_name, process_suffix UNIQUE, description, operation_seq, industry_code, is_active, marker, UNIQUE(tenant_id, operation_name)). Seed file packages/db/seeds/manufacturing-operations.ts emits 3 industry seeds (bakery: Mix/Knead/Proof/Bake; pharma: Synthesis/Separation/Crystallization/Drying; fmcg: Mix/Fill/Seal/Label). RLS policy. Drizzle schema.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0013_manufacturing_operations.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/manufacturing-operations.ts [create]
- packages/db/seeds/manufacturing-operations.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/manufacturing-operations.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0013 ran and seed executed for tenant T1 with industry_code='bakery', when querying, then 4 rows (Mix/Knead/Proof/Bake) exist with suffixes (MX/KN/PR/BK)
2. Given two operations with same name in same tenant, when INSERT second runs, then UNIQUE(tenant_id, operation_name) rejects
3. Given seed run for pharma tenant, when querying, then Synthesis|SY, Separation|SE, Crystallization|CZ, Drying|DR exist

## Test strategy
- RED: tests asserting seeded rows per industry + uniqueness
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed:manufacturing-operations && pnpm --filter db test manufacturing-operations'

## Risk red lines
- Do not seed without tenant_id
- Do not allow process_suffix collisions across the same tenant
- Do not commit fmcg-cosmetic operations beyond the 4 PRD-listed defaults

pipeline_inputs.description: Reference.ManufacturingOperations table + Bakery/Pharmacy/FMCG seed enabling tenant-configurable process names and suffixes.
pipeline_inputs.details: DDL per §4.5 with UNIQUE(tenant_id, operation_name) and process_suffix global UNIQUE. Seed file inserts 3 industry sets. Drizzle schema mirrors. RLS scoped to tenant_id.
